My current status as a multi - media designer

is an online and pop - up market place carrying a varied inventory of health and beauty related products. A typical day sees me serving the Marketing Team and its Clients through creation of strategic, multi - channel marketing assets. My role focuses on building high impact creatives for commercial campaigns that enhance brand visibility, engagement, and conversion performance to drive presence, audience engagement and commercial growth. This involves collaborating with cross - functional stakeholders to design and produce media across digital advertising, in the form of web components for paid ads, landing pages, EDM, social media, motion graphics, video, animation, infographics and print ready files for events, booklets, articles also novelties, promotions and POS materials. Strong consumer demand for premium Australasian products continues to drive growth, creating significant opportunities for Vendors to expand their reach through a globally connected retail ecosystem. This scalable approach to market expansion remains a key driver of sustained business growth and brand success.

The Market Place

The Market Place is designed to drive measurable commercial performance by increasing brand discoverability, improving conversion efficiency, and enabling scalable customer acquisition across global markets. The Market Place provides commercial opportunities to increase brand discoverability, accelerate customer acquisition, and deliver a seamless global shopping experience. It's user centric design and optimised shopping experience support higher engagement, stronger purchase intent and seamless cross border transactions. Recognised brands and innovative startups alike leverage the market place to strengthen their digital presence and connect with new audiences across international markets.

The Clients

The primary objective is to strengthen brand visibility for emerging businesses and preserve established brands' identities through continuous delivery of multi - channel marketing assets designed to drive engagement, conversion and revenue growth. Success begins with understanding each brand's unique market position, audience and value proposition. Through research led insights and targeted storytelling, campaigns are developed to resonate with customers by underpinning commercial objectives. Once live, creative assets are continuously optimized using performance data and audience analytics, enabling agile refinement of messaging, tone, format, and content to maximize return on investment.

My Services

My technical design expertise, reliability and dependable approach foster confidence among Colleagues and Clients, by indicating that I am a safe pair of hands they can rely on to ensure requirements are clearly understood and translated into high roi outcomes. Being a community minded designer enables me to build the necessary credibility to coordinate briefs and run with stakeholder input. Excelling in fast paced environments, I consistently interpret evolving business needs into creative solutions to drive results. The greatest measure of success is delivering work to exceed expectations by driving tangible growth, engagement and long term value, by always going the extra distance for the Client and their brand.

Below are a series of animated banners, interactions and media assets I created for some of our Clients. These demonstrate standard criteria and frameworks I operate within to adapt to different brand, industry and product requirements. My approach combines strategic and creative execution across the full production lifecycle. This entails accessing, sourcing or organising brand assets into or inside structured resource libraries, designing and writing code, 2D + 3D animation, video/motion design, photography, illustration and graphics, specific to the brief. Defining and orchestrating design synergy by tracking live metrics through cross - functional collaboration inform direction of my services. Dynamic editing to test creatives is generally the most effective formula in terms of increasing lead generation, giving latitude to capitalise during peak engagement periods.

BANNER + EDM SERIES

Ownership of: media design

Timeline: pre launch and ongoing

Priority: high quality interactive and short form ad production

Style: interactive 2D animation

run organizational ads to promote their Vendors, also offer marketing outreach packages, an option available to Vendors consigning their brands. are a Client interested in positioning their brand as a household name. They provide high quality dog foods made from all the good bits that dogs love. Generating leads to extend the brand's reach is fundamental to success for this company, they are all - in on their mission to supply excellent nutritional products to many more dogs. To accomplish expansion, they have researched and studied metrics to define their:
1 key market - identified by calculating interaction averages
2 platforms - understand which styles work best where by tracking impressions and CTOR
3 focus - getting more people (and dogs!) excited about the brand. A retail deal with a major supplier is in the pipeline and pop - ups, giveaways and samples are generating an increase in sales

1 Who is Buying

Heatmap indicates diverse audience across Europe, Australasia, America, signalling the demand for canine nutritional products in common, enabled by high discretionary income

2 Getting Noticed

Push, track digital ads including EDM, paid ads, social media promo. Prepare digital + print ready files for impromtu events ie paid ads, templates, novelties also POS, corflutes, etc

3 How it Pays

Enhance conversion through targeted BOGO activations and voucher incentives, facilitating education around canine nutrition to improve commercial outcomes

To raise their conversion rate, researched to identify causes contributing to suspected user fatigue. They concluded that creative saturation across digital media, notably in visual design and asset composition, appears to be an underlying determinant, resulting in increased impression volume without proportional improvement in return on investment. A/B testing across creative variants indicates a statistically consistent preference for minimalistic design systems, supporting the development of standardised, scalable creative frameworks aligned with observed user behavior. The primary objective is to achieve a 1 – 2% improvement in key performance metrics while reducing overall Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) through an agile creative optimization workflow, leveraging rapid iteration of live paid media assets to measure incremental gains in engagement, conversion efficiency, and organic search (SEO) performance.

doglove26
$50

OPEN    CODE

Google Ads banner 300×600 skyscraper

This free food banner:
part of a series of commercial web components
The design directive for this project required taking a bold approach to optimising a memorable, attention - grabbing media series to catalyze a measurable advance in conversion rate. Having worked with branding on previous occasions, I had researched their function so understood the brief to align on strategic intent. Following initial concept development, I engaged stakeholders to present a proposed interactive Google Display banner concept, positioned as a user - led voucher experience. The solution centred on an interactive ‘box’ mechanism, allowing users to open the creative, reveal and copy a voucher code and directly access the associated landing page. This interactive approach was well received, and I subsequently shared the front end code alongside a series of animated asset variations, including dynamic ‘dog’ sequences. Upon approval, I delivered the final production ready asset alongside a curated set of scalable creative resources to guide broader campaign deployment. The banner now forms part of a wider performance led creative suite being published and iteratively tested by the team to evaluate conversion impact. Below is a summary of the project scope, outlining my methodology, intent, and technical approach, alongside excerpts from the original brief and stakeholder communications.

Guidelines for developing these materials:
Output/Function: develop and deliver website, e - commerce, social media and paid media assets for the Client, with a primary focus on app warm - up and pre/post launch campaigns. Create, adapt, and deploy high impact marketing materials to highlight offers and discounts in alignment with the app refresh, driving awareness, engagement and conversion. Timeline: review and consult on creative drafts to secure approvals ahead of key deadlines, end to end publisher and distributior of content across pre and post launch phases of the app going live. Deliverables: a comprehensive catalogue of dynamic marketing assets including animations, GIFs, video/graphic content and interactive components for landing pages, EDMs, banner advertising and additional digital touchpoints to amplify the rollout.

CLIENT'S BRIEF

"Produce promo media for us that converts please! Could you mockup 2d animations/banner concepts for us and share them with our media coordinator to be ranked by our team."

FROM CONCEPT TO REALITY

"Please go ahead with completing the free food box banner featuring the selected 'Doggy' animation. Use colours from the palette guide, preferably the dark blue and yellow so there's contrast."

THE PRODUCT

"Thanks, they look great. Please refer to our repository and upload the templates for us there. Also keep us updated on which of the paid ads and EDM are moving, we will do the same!"

Illustrated, animated sequence for HTML5 canvas

Design and deployment tools and systems:
"I use JavaScript to create interactive web/app/banner elements. These are designs tailored by me, informed by cross-collab and data analysis specific to your brand's story. I animate HTML5 canvas or use Visual Studio Code to write interactive animations. These are the target market's prefered medium indicated by stats from previous ads. I design and write inline code and CSS interactive templates for Klavyio, ensuring the provider will read the code by testing on over 20+ providers to confirm readability and usability. Google Display ready - zipped, undersized, optimised - I stage and test compatibility before going live to ensure it looks right across a range of devices."

The “running dog” asset made with Adobe Animate is part of a series of illustrated sequential motion graphics for lightweight deployment across banners, EDMs and other digital media. This output substantiates evolution of a simplified storefront visual identity, with these assets contributing to the finalisation of design direction. For continuity and operational efficiency, all style guides and source files are built editable and reusable, ensuring scalability and consistency for future applications. The files and associated code are available from the team repository, ensuring assets remain accessible for ongoing collaboration, iteration, and deployment.

All deliverables and media assets are maintained in a centralised repository and continuously updated in response to live market performance. Component templates have been modularised for ease of use, with comprehensive style guides available to ensure consistency across all touchpoints. A suite of paid media and EDM assets is production ready and available for immediate deployment. Ongoing performance metrics will be monitored and benchmarked to audit engagement, inform optimisation strategies and initiate iterative refinement of live campaign activity. The designated coordinator will oversee repository management and commission additional assets as required.

BRAND GLOW UP

Ownership of: branding, label, promo refresh

Deliverables: brand continuity. Scalable volume for reference

Priority: redraw/model label, develop promotional media around new design

provide personalised services for their Clients including customised essential oil blends and meditation experiences. The brand holds credibility as a holistic onsite destination and an established Vendor, which is a significant advantage within the trust driven aromatherapy sector. A substantial proportion of Clients are acquired through in person consultations, services and product sampling. Following these interactions, many customers subsequently express intent to repurchase via the online store, highlighting a clear pathway from physical engagement to e - commerce conversion. To expedite this transition, the product offering is being expanded through a more refined, conversion focused digital marketing approach. The label redesign of their flagship product — the rollerball - serves as the foundation for a broad suite of marketing assets, with careful consideration given to scaling the visual identity across Google Display advertising, social media, POS and promotional materials during the scoping phase.

YOUR CODE:
calmBlends26
GET
CODE
Google Ads banner 300x250 m-rec

It does the trick:
freebies to get the rollerball rolling!
The brief stipulated retention of the existing logo and oil droplet device, with all required product information and branding integrated into a compact label design, targeted towards the Shopify retail environment. After proposing and introducing a colour coded system to delineate the standard blend range, the “Calm” variant was assigned a violet and yellow scheme, characterising clear distinction and intuitive brand recognition. Following the label refresh and approval, I used 3D modelling software to construct an accurate digital representation of the rollerball product based on its precise dimensions, enabling rigorous pre production testing prior to committing to print or digital asset production. Next, I developed the resulting rollerball animated sprite as the creative focal point within this 300×250 medium rectangle banner and integrated it in parallel with the promotional voucher mechanism, adjacent to the arrow based callout component. The 'arrow' features interactive JavaScript “galaxy” and CSS “cloud” elements, created by me as part of an engaging digital incentive experience. The following section includes correspondence with the team relating to execution and rollout.

CLIENT'S BRIEF

"We use hand written labels which is cool because as you know, our product is hand blended, so it's been apt. But, it's hard to clearly write all the details on, also it's time consuming. Can you fit the details from the list we gave you to model an attractive label we can use a marker to write our batch numbers and expiry dates?"

THE REDRAW

"We love it, thanks Queen. The shiny oil slick effect is so nice and the wave cutout detail is awesome. Can't wait to see how the the coral/blue combination turns out. And you fit all the details in there so cleanly and compact. It's just what we wanted. Send us a Slack notification when you've staged the roller banner."

UPDATING THE LABEL

"Spoke to the laser people, they are going to cut foil labels as soon as they have the file. All the uploads look good. Can you access our Klavyio account? Let us know because we want you to please add those email templates for the newsletter journey so it's ready for us to announce the label and brand refresh."

Commission outline:
Output: lead label redesign, define brand direction including development of comprehensive style guides encompassing design libraries, references, terminology indexes and glossaries. Deliverables: integrated branding including labels, paid ad dynamic content, EDM templates and source files reinforced by a suite of social media and marketing collateral to administer promotional products and services across all key channels. Communication: during the design process and consecutively overseeing advertising activity, initiating agile fine - tuning in alignment with rollout timelines and key performance metrics. Map comprehensive customer journies, integrating scheduling systems and content calendars.

rollerball model animated with new label
Illustrated, animated sequence for HTML5 canvas

"For your emails, I will design, write and upload the code and templates to your Klavyio and Mailchimp accounts after we test them there and on other systems. To ensure they load correctly, I will test the code on 20+ providers to confirm. I use JavaScript to design and create interactive content. The rollerball model was built and animated in After Effects. To animate the assets for social media and banners, I will use this and other Adobe CC apps and text editors such as Visual Studio Code to design and write code also edit and export video and HTML5 canvas. We will use Google Display to publish your banners as you can get a good metric gauge there. We will also chase your stats from our end so we know what to edit, boost, etc. When we're up and running, I'll show you how to publish and maintain all of these files and I'm only a phone call away if you need assistance."

The decision to move forward with the label design and new style was unanimous, at which point I produced a series of banners, animations and EDM templates to publicly announce the brand glow up. Product placement: Streamlining the membership experience so that it's accessible through a Shopify webstore dashboard will leverage the broader market by expediting sales, appointments and enquiries for Clients while maximising profit margins.

Designing a label with strong on shelf differentiation and appeal while building recognition and trust with new and current buyers in the aromatherapy community was key to success for this campaign. The refreshed brand system establishes a cohesive visual language to champion future marketing initiatives, ensuring consistency across all touchpoints and reinforcing the premium quality and value proposition of the product and services offering.

FAQs

These are some of the general questions I'm frequently asked about my design services

I am starting or re-branding and I have limited or outdated design resources for my business. Should I put more together before we talk?

Great question! Often, early stage chaos is the ideal time to begin dialogue. Helping you build the right foundation instead of critiquing polished mistakes can establish brand consistency. We can review files, discuss storytelling structure and work on brand positioning. So don’t go out of your way to compile or design more, we will evaluate any existing assets and ideas and go from there!

How can I best prepare for our consults?

The more context I have about your brand or your vision for it, the more value I can provide for you. Share any materials you have prior to our meeting. All good if you're undecided about your brand's visual direction, you can leave it to me to research and recommend styles, also mock up concepts. Whether you are starting from scratch or continuing an existing style, I've got you coverered.

Will you give us nice feedback?

I deliver professional results through objective, analytical action of feedback. This means I won’t be mean when indicating where it's prudent to refine systems to establish or increase measurably valuble returns. Expect direct, honest, constructive critique to push your brand to bluechip standards.

What is your design experience and education?

I have 6 years experience as a multi - media designer My qualifications include Bachelor of Art and Design and Business Diploma. View my Design and Business qualifications.

Please contact me any time with your own questions!
